walter.name: Dr. Adrian Walter
publicFacts: Chief doctor of Rosenfeld.
Taught at the medical school and was beloved by students.
Had a perfect reputation: charity work, helped orphans.
Found dead in his office in the hospital.
Official early version: suicide, but inconsistencies exist.
hiddenFacts: Conducted secret psychological experiments on children.
Liam was one of his experimental subjects.
Planned to confess that he 'went too far' days before death.

elena.name: Elena Varga
publicFacts: Walter visited her café almost daily.
Knew Walter since their student years.
Saw him unusually depressed the day before his death.
hiddenFacts: Knew Walter secretly met children at the hospital at night.
Had a brief romantic relationship with Walter years ago.
Has a note from Walter implying he 'did something irreversible'.

ernst.name: Ernst Bauer
publicFacts: Worked as a hospital guard for over 20 years.
Thought Walter was 'the only good man here'.
Avoids questions about the 'old wing'.
hiddenFacts: Guarded a closed lab where Walter worked.
Heard children’s cries at night but trusted Walter’s excuses.
Knows Liam had night access to the hospital and hides it.

clara.name: Clara Weiss
publicFacts: Took over all documents after Walter’s death.
Some residents claim she lived elsewhere for a while.
Supported her brother but avoids details about their relationship.
hiddenFacts: Knew Walter conducted unofficial experiments on children.
Hid part of Walter’s archives before the detective arrived.
Was near the hospital on the night of the murder for unknown reasons.

liam.name: Liam Becker
publicFacts: Helps around the medical school with cleaning and paperwork.
Has no friends among peers, but adults respect him.
Seems calm, but looks deeply shaken by Walter’s death.
hiddenFacts: Was a child patient at a private clinic funded by Walter.
Has an abnormally low pain reaction due to experiments.
Was at the hospital late on the night of the murder, but hides it.

mara.name: Mara Kovács
mara.personality: Cold, strict, logical; controls emotions well
publicFacts: Worked with Walter for over 10 years.
Regularly tested students for psychological stability.
Was closing the school on the evening of the murder.
hiddenFacts: Witnessed Walter’s early experiments but didn’t stop him.
Possesses copies of Liam’s psychological test results.
Knew Walter wanted to shut down the project and feared the truth.
